response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the role requires a CTO with 5+ years senior technical leadership, proven multi-agent AI systems in production, fintech infrastructure depth, and experience scaling teams from 10 to 30+. The resume shows no people-management, no executive leadership, no production multi-agent AI systems, and only tangential fintech exposure (RIDE Capital ~1 year as IC). Title is 'Senior/Staff Software Engineer' rather than any leadership role.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering tenure across web, backend, and distributed systems
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Brief fintech-adjacent experience at RIDE Capital with modern engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering teams to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems at scale
Lacks deep fintech infrastructure experience (credit risk, working capital, regulated environments)

key_factors.factor: Missing production multi-agent AI systems experience
